title: Bengaluru court grants transit anticipatory bail to CoinDCX founders in fraud case
description: A Bengaluru sessions court on March 24 granted interim transit anticipatory bail to CoinDCX co-founders Sumit Gupta and Neeraj Khandelwal, and four others, in a cheating and impersonation case registered in Maharashtra [Sumit Gupta Vs Belandur PS].The LXVII Additional City Civil and Sessions Judge granted interim protection to enable the accused to approach jurisdictional courts in Maharashtra for regular anticipatory bail or other relief.The case arose from first information reports (FIRs) regi
